Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the cases Case 1 Receive Application RA Validate Form VF Assess Eligibility AE Request Missing Info RMI Validate Form VF Approval Decision AD Send Confirmation SC Archive Case AC Case 2 Receive Application RA Validate Form VF Assess Eligibility AE Approval Decision AD Send Confirmation SC Archive Case AC Case 3 Receive Application RA Validate Form VF Assess Eligibility AE Request Missing Info RMI Request Missing Info RMI Validate Form VF Approval Decision AD Send Confirmation SC Archive Case AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me identify the patterns 1 Main sequence RA VF AE AD SC AC 2 Optional loop between AE and AD AE RMI VF AD In case 1 AE RMI VF AD In case 2 AE AD direct no loop In case 3 AE RMI RMI VF AD

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: So the structure seems to be RA VF AE loop RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Actually looking at case 3 AE RMI RMI VF AD And case 1 AE RMI VF AD Case 2 AE AD So the pattern is After AE there is a loop where we can have RMI possibly multiple times and possibly VF The VF seems to come after the last RMI if there are RMIs If no RMIs we go directly to AD

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Hmm this is interesting Let me think about this more carefully

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The common prefix is RA VF AE The common suffix is AD SC AC In between there is the loop behavior

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: So the middle part can be Empty case 2 RMI VF case 1 RMI RMI VF case 3

Name: Validation - IND
Text: If we set A RMI and B VF then Case 2 Execute A once exit but wait this would give just RMI not empty Case 1 Execute A exit then no this does not work either

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The structure could be After AE XOR empty SEQ RMI plus VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For case 2 Choose empty go to AD For case 1 Choose SEQ RMI plus VF which gives RMI VF go to AD For case 3 Choose SEQ RMI plus VF which gives RMI RMI VF go to AD

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: To model one or more of an activity we need a loop star RMI tau

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After AE X tau SEQ star RMI tau VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 zero RMIs Choose tau Case 1 one RMI Choose star RMI tau then VF Execute RMI once exit then VF Result RMI VF Case 3 two RMIs Choose star RMI tau then VF Execute RMI continue with tau then RMI exit then VF Result RMI RMI VF This seems to work

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the full process tree would be SEQ RA VF AE X tau SEQ star RMI tau VF AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me verify with all cases Case 2 trace RA VF AE AD SC AC choose tau skip the SEQ part AD SC AC Case 1 trace RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC choose SEQ star RMI tau VF execute RMI once exit VF continue AD SC AC Case 3 trace RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC choose SEQ star RMI tau VF execute RMI tau RMI exit VF continue AD SC AC Perfect This captures the behavior
